title: Spider Stopper Spray with Peppermint Oil, Non-Toxic Indoor Spider Deterrent for Windows, Doors & Corners, Scented Barrier, 750ml - 5L Refill, Stop Spiders, Alternative to Spider Repellent (1 x 750ML)

features: Natural Formula: Spider Stopper is made with naturally derived essential oils, including peppermint oil, to create a scented barrier that helps discourage spiders from entering treated areas.
Non-Toxic and Safe: Contains no harsh chemicals. Safe for use indoors and around children and pets once surfaces are dry. Not a pesticide or biocidal product.
For Indoor Use: Designed for use around windows, doors, corners, skirting boards, vents, and behind furniture - common entry points and resting places for spiders.
Fresh Scent: Leaves a clean, natural peppermint fragrance in your home.
Easy Application: Shake well before use. Spray lightly on clean, dry surfaces. . For best results, apply to clean, dry surfaces and reapply every 1–2 weeks or after cleaning.
description: Product Description Versatile Use for Indoor Application For indoor use, Spider Stopper is ideal for spraying around windows, doors, corners, vents, baseboards, and behind furniture. The fresh peppermint scent leaves your home smelling clean while helping to deter spiders from treated areas. Easy to use and safe for homes, offices, and other indoor spaces. Suitable for windows, doors, corners, vents, skirting boards, and behind furniture Leaves a clean, natural peppermint fragrance Easy application with a light mist spray Liquipak Spider Stopper Natural Formula to Help Discourage Spiders Spider Stopper is a gentle surface spray formulated with naturally derived essential oils, including peppermint oil, designed to help create a scented barrier that discourages spiders from entering your home. Suitable for use indoors and around windows, doors, skirting boards, and other common entry points, Spider Stopper provides a simple way to help keep your living spaces free from spiders without the use of harsh chemicals. Made with naturally derived essential oils, including peppermint oil Non-Toxic and Safe: Contains no harsh chemicals; safe once surfaces are dry Gentle Approach: Helps to discourage spiders without causing harm Perfect for Safe and Simple Home Use Shake well before use. Lightly spray around common entry points and areas where spiders may be found. For best results, apply to clean, dry surfaces. Reapply every 1 - 2 weeks or after cleaning treated areas. Avoid over-spraying; a light mist is sufficient. Do not spray directly onto fabrics or delicate surfaces without spot testing first. Specifications Formula: Naturally derived essential oils, including peppermint oil Application: For indoor use on clean, dry surfaces Sizes: 750ml trigger spray or 5-litre refill Use Frequency: Reapply every 1–2 weeks or after cleaning treated areas Made with quality ingredients by Liquipak See More
